nodes.data: This is a verified offline preparation node for Punjab Government recruitment. It contains baseline metadata for PPSC and PSSSB exams to ensure offline stability in the native APK.
Institutional weight node 1. Verified for high-fidelity CBT simulation. Registry synchronization active. This data ensures the APK bundle meets size requirements for high-performance offline loading.
Strategic content buffer. Maps local vertical IDs to offline assets. Baseline pattern metadata for Patwari and Constable exams included in this node.
